The Music

The Message
Is Here

For years, James & Olevia have ministered through worship, church, community service, education, and outreach. Now comes the release of Ready For You, Volume 1 — a project born from prayer, testimony, and real-life journeys with God.

The event was just the beginning — now the real work starts. We are focused on getting Ready For You, Volume 1 into the hands of every person who needs to hear it, be healed by it, and have their life transformed through it. This is the next phase, and we need partners who believe in the message and are ready to help carry it to the world.

Your support helps us

  • Expand radio promotion
  • Reach new listeners nationwide
  • Continue ministry outreach
  • Impact future generations now

About The Artists

James &
Olevia

James & Olevia are a brother-sister Gospel duo committed to ministry through music, worship, and community impact. Together they blend authentic worship, powerful storytelling, and generational influence to create music that points people toward hope and purpose.

"Anchored in grace. Strengthened by the Blood. Surrendered to the Spirit. Positioned for God to move."

Their newest project, Ready For You, Volume 1, represents a declaration of faith — a musical testimony forged through real seasons of trust, surrender, and breakthrough.
